caption: The video features three individuals seated on wooden chairs on a stage, engaged in a discussion. The person on the left, dressed in a white shirt and black pants, is actively gesturing with their hands, suggesting they are explaining or emphasizing a point. The individual in the center, wearing a black t-shirt, listens attentively with their hands clasped together. The person on the right, in a gray suit, also appears to be listening intently, with one leg crossed over the other. In front of them, there is a table with an intricate, metallic object that resembles a complex mechanical or electronic device. The background is illuminated with purple lighting and features a large screen displaying abstract visuals, adding to the professional and tech-oriented atmosphere of the setting.
